title: Tamable Dragon
description: Adds a new tamable dragon pet
body:
# Tamable Dragons

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qUfHGk1AP8w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Description

This mod adds a tamable and rideable dragon mob which can be hatched from the dragon egg.

## Hatching

Build this:

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_78312707-e276-467c-bceb-3b038d1c5f38.png)

Place the dragon egg in the middle.

## Controls

*   Move forward (default: W): Fly forward
*   Jump (default: Space): Ascend
*   Move backwards (default: S): Descend

## Taming

Tamable using a chorus flower (right click)

## Dragon Nest

I know what you're thinking, give up the dragon egg? Only have one dragon pet?

No.

Dragon nests are a new structure which will spawn in the end, in addition to loot it has a chance to generate a new dragon egg.
